texto: In short, women themselves absorb and transmit misogynistic values, just as men do. This is not a tidy world of tyrannical men and victimized women, but a messier realm of oppressive social customs adhered to by men and women alike.
explicacao: Citação de Nicholas Kristof and Sheryl WuDunn sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “In short, women themselves absorb and transmit misogynistic values, just as men do. This is not a…” articula reflexao, sexism, women em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
